claims.detail: Storage account lacks a Data Lifecycle Management policy; data at rest retention exceeds 90 days without documented justification, violating the submitted compliance rule pack.

findings.description: Azure Storage account does not have a lifecycle management policy configured; objects older than 90 days remain in hot tier indefinitely, breaching data-retention compliance controls.
findings.recommendation: Apply a lifecycle management policy that transitions blobs to cool tier after 30 days and deletes them after 90 days unless an explicit retention hold is documented.
